summary: Populated CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] with curated current-cycle release notes. The notes summarize release-facing outcomes from localization routing, HIG/accessibility proof workflows, reminder cancellation fixes, error-copy cleanup, release provenance, and validation gates without turning the changelog into operational slice history.
validations_passed: git fetch origin main && git pull --rebase origin main
missing_proof_levels: No build or app runtime validation was required; this slice changed release documentation and queue metadata only.

contract_status_changes.before: CHANGELOG.md existed with [Unreleased] and stable headings, but no current-cycle release notes.
contract_status_changes.after: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] contains curated current-cycle notes grouped by Added, Changed, Fixed, Localization, and Release And Validation.

contract_status_changes.before: The current cycle was documented in SecondBrain and handoffs, but not summarized for TestFlight, App Store, support, or rollback readers.
contract_status_changes.after: CHANGELOG.md summarizes release-facing outcomes while detailed slice and proof history remains in SecondBrain, handoffs, and queue metadata.

residual_risks: Tools/bump-version.sh still needs the queued release-changelog-required-gate slice so missing CHANGELOG.md or missing [Unreleased] fails before release metadata mutation.
recommended_next_reason: The changelog now exists and contains current-cycle notes, so the next clean release step is enforcing changelog presence before bump-version mutates MARKETING_VERSION or CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION.
